_about: Goals for the Verifyr eval harness. Each entry is a bare string or an object {goal, web_value | web_url+web_selector}. The source-of-truth value is used by the parity verifier when the agent emits an assert. Provide either a literal web_value, or a web_url (+optional web_selector / web_attribute) to capture it live with Playwright.

goals.goal: Open the product 'Summer Tote' and read its displayed price
Open the product 'Summer Tote' and read its displayed price
Open the app Settings screen and read the app version number

goals: Navigate to the cart and report how many items it contains
